creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Sat Mar 23 08:20:11 2013
New Revision: 315013
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315013

Log:
  - Update to 1.14

Modified: head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 08:12:02 2013	(r315012)
+++ head/deskutils/dosage/Makefile	Sat Mar 23 08:20:11 2013	(r315013)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dosage
-PORTVERSION=	1.13
+PORTVERSION=	1.14
 CATEGORIES=	deskutils python
 
 MAINTAINER=	antoine@FreeBSD.org
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}requ
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	wummel
 GH_TAGNAME=	upstream/${PORTVERSION}
-GH_COMMIT=	950a958
+GH_COMMIT=	179ba7f
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
